lesson.menu_desc: How Much, How Many and Shopping Vocabulary -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Shopping Basics -- How Much, How Many and Shopping Vocabulary
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Dienane Brandão de Mesquita | Aula 8 -- Shopping Basics

listenings.text: Hello, let me tell you about my favorite store. It is a small store near my house. The store has nice clothes and good prices. The shirts are cheap, but the shoes are a little expensive. When I buy something, I always ask: how much is it? I pay with my money, and the clerk gives me a receipt. I shop there because the people are friendly and the prices are fair.

Good morning, welcome to our store. I work here as a clerk. We sell clothes, bags, and shoes. Many customers come every day. They ask: how much is this? or how many do you have? Some products are cheap and some are expensive. When a customer buys something, I take the money and I give a receipt. I like my job because I help people find good prices.

extra_audio.text: Dienane goes to the store in the afternoon. She looks at the shirts and asks the price. The clerk says the price is cheap. She pays with her money. The clerk gives her a receipt.
